results.requirement_text: The system shall allow an administrator to deactivate a user account.

test_cases.title: Administrator deactivates a user account
test_cases.objective: Verify that an administrator can deactivate a user account
test_cases.technique_used: Functional test via UI or API
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Exercise the configured capability using valid input consistent with the requirement.
steps.expected_result: The specified user account is deactivated.
